final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: landscape photography, editorial travel photo
Primary request: aerial and ground-level composite view of Jiangnan water town during rapeseed flower season
Scene/backdrop: ancient village in Zhejiang province, rolling hills with golden rapeseed fields stretching to horizon, terraced tea plantations on distant hills
Subject: traditional white-wall black-tiled houses scattered among golden flower fields, ancient stone arch bridge over clear river, weeping willows swaying by the bridge, villagers in traditional clothing working in fields
Style/medium: drone aerial photography combined with telephoto lens, photorealistic landscape
Composition/framing: wide panoramic view with layered depth, foreground river and bridge, midground village and flower fields, background hills and sky
Lighting/mood: natural morning light at 10 AM, soft and poetic atmosphere, vibrant yet balanced saturation
Color palette: golden yellow rapeseed flowers, emerald green tea terraces and willow leaves, clear azure blue sky with white clouds, white walls and dark grey tiles of traditional architecture
Materials/textures: delicate rapeseed petals, weathered stone bridge surface, flowing river water, traditional fabric textures of villager clothing, tiled roof textures
Constraints: maintain the poetic and lively atmosphere, preserve the color contrast between golden fields and green tea terraces, keep the smoke wisps rising from rooftops
Avoid: oversaturated colors, artificial HDR look, modern elements, deformed architecture, plastic-looking vegetation, watermark
